untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition (two peaks of similar height with valley between them) which cannot be expressed using only point-in-time technical indicators. The double-top pattern detection requires multi-bar analysis of peak identification, height comparison, and valley detection that is beyond the scope of simple indicator-based rules. Additionally, volume shape analysis (U-shape), volume trend direction changes, and comparative volume ratios between multiple peaks cannot be directly encoded with the available indicators.
translation_notes: This is a complex chart pattern that requires visual/algorithmic pattern recognition rather than indicator thresholds. A proper implementation would need: (1) peak detection algorithm to identify two local maxima, (2) valley detection between peaks, (3) volume comparison logic between bars at different time points, (4) trend slope analysis for volume between peaks. The signal is fundamentally incompatible with simple rule-based indicator conditions.
